title: MT outcome recording + 6-level escalation routing + DistillationCandidate emission
goal: Implement the MT outcome recording surface that, given a MicroTaskJob completion or failure, (a) writes the canonical outcome row + completion_signal + run_ledger_ref, (b) routes failures through the 6-level escalation chain (T7B->T7B-alt->T13B->T13B-alt->T32B->HardGate), (c) emits DistillationCandidate artifacts + FR-EVT-MT-015 for logging-only distillation per folded stub WP-1-Micro-Task-Executor-v1.
expected_diff_shape: New Rust module src/backend/handshake_core/src/process_ledger/mt_outcome.rs + src/backend/handshake_core/src/process_ledger/escalation_router.rs + src/backend/handshake_core/src/distillation/candidate.rs (light surface only — full distillation pipeline is cluster C); integration tests under src/backend/handshake_core/tests/mt_outcome_tests.rs.
unblock_conditions: MT-184 job primitive + MT-185 checkpoint contract + MT-177 mailbox repo all merged so outcome can reference the loop chain and post escalation messages to the mailbox.
implementation_notes: Per folded WP-1-Micro-Task-Executor-v1 stub intent (refinement.json line 995): 'support a 6-level escalation chain (7B->7B-alt->13B->13B-alt->32B->HARD_GATE) with LoRA selection by task_tags, and emit DistillationCandidate artifacts + FR-EVT-MT-015 for logging-only distillation in Phase 1.' `MtOutcomeRecorder::record(job, outcome: MtOutcome) -> Result<MtOutcomeRecord, OutcomeError>` writes the canonical row: `MtOutcomeRecord { outcome_id: Uuid v7, job_id (FK), iteration_n, outcome_kind: OutcomeKind (Success|Failure|Verification|Cancellation|Timeout), completion_signal: Option<CompletionSignal>, run_ledger_ref: Option<RunLedgerPointer>, evidence_pointers: Vec<EvidencePointer>, distillation_candidate_id: Option<Uuid v7>, recorded_at_utc, recorded_by_session: Uuid v7 }`. On Success: also produces a `DistillationCandidate { candidate_id: Uuid v7, job_id, summary: String, prompt_response_trace: Vec<TraceEvent>, tier_at_completion: EscalationTier, created_at_utc }` written to a `distillation_candidate` Postgres table (logging-only per Phase 1; cluster C MT-XXX wires the full pipeline). Emits FR-EVT-MT-015. On Failure: `EscalationRouter::route(job, outcome) -> EscalationDecision { Retry { same_tier } | EscalateTo { next_tier, lora_id } | HardGate { reason } | Abandon { reason } }`. Algorithm: (1) check loop_control budget remaining (MT-185); (2) if exhausted at current tier, lookup `EscalationTier::next(current)`; (3) select LoRA by job.task_tags using a simple tag-to-lora map (configurable, MT-184 sets default empty map; cluster C MTE-LoRA-Wiring fold provides the production map); (4) update job.escalation_tier, append to job.escalation_history, post `micro_task_escalation` message to job's mailbox_thread_id (MT-179 family). HardGate transitions job.state=`HardGated` and posts decision_request message to operator role. Tests: (a) Success records outcome + DistillationCandidate + FR-EVT-MT-015; (b) 3 consecutive failures at T7B exhaust budget -> EscalateTo T7BAlt with mailbox message posted; (c) failure at HardGate returns Abandon if max_hardgate_retries exceeded; (d) FR event registry IDs validated (MT-198).
risk_if_missed: Without canonical outcome recording, MT failures lose audit trail; without escalation routing, the 6-tier chain stays unwired; without DistillationCandidate emission, Phase 1 distillation evidence is dropped (folded WP-1-Micro-Task-Executor-v1 stub intent regression).
validator_focus: Escalation tier monotonic (tested); LoRA selection from task_tags deterministic; HardGate transitions always emit operator decision_request message (no silent pauses); DistillationCandidate rows queryable for downstream cluster C pipeline.

fixes.summary: MicroTaskQueue::ensure_schema now executes embedded multi-statement migration SQL with sqlx::raw_sql; HardGate receipt check now runs only after validating that the requested tier transition is legal.
fixes.gap_closed: Fixed PostgreSQL prepared-statement rejection for multi-command schema SQL and restored InvalidEscalation precedence for terminal/skip-tier HardGate attempts.

fixes.summary: MtOutcomeRecorder::ensure_schema now uses sqlx::raw_sql for embedded multi-statement migration SQL.
fixes.gap_closed: Fixed MT-188 live Postgres schema setup for 0027 outcome/distillation candidate additions.

implementation_record.summary: Implemented MT outcome recording contract surfaces, budget-aware escalation routing, DistillationCandidate Phase-1 emission, FR-EVT-MT-015 Flight Recorder emission, RoleMailbox escalation/HardGate posting, executor HardGate fail-closed behavior, LoRA persistence support on queue escalation, and FR registry schema alignment for the emitted candidate payload.

sources_checked: Local MT-184 MicroTaskJob and MicroTaskQueue implementation
Local MT-185 MtLoopControlBudget and checkpoint implementation
Local MT-177 RoleMailboxRepository and MT-179 typed message families
Local FlightRecorder event model and MT-198 FR event registry
Subagent research on Postgres outcome durability, SELECT FOR UPDATE ownership checks, durable events, skip-locked claiming, typed Rust APIs, and UUIDv7 identity
selected_patterns: Use pure recorder methods for executor hot-loop tests and Postgres persist methods for durable outcome rows.
Use MT-185 max_consecutive_failures in executor routing instead of the router-local default.
Post decision_request through RoleMailbox before returning HardGated from the mailbox-wired executor path.
Fail closed when HardGate is selected and the job has no mailbox_thread_id.
Emit FR-EVT-MT-015 with wp_id, mt_id, and candidate_ref matching the registered schema.
Keep DistillationCandidate status defaulted to LOGGING_ONLY_PHASE_1.
rejected_options: Leaving HardGate mailbox posting as a standalone helper only, because the executor path could still return HardGated silently.
Keeping FR-EVT-MT-015 registered as candidate_score, because the actual emitted payload references a candidate artifact rather than a score.
Letting MicroTaskQueue::escalate write HardGate directly, because the red-team control requires a decision_request receipt before the hardgate state commit.

minimum_controls: HardGate transition always posts a decision_request mailbox message (test asserts message persisted before state transition commits).
DistillationCandidate Postgres table has a status column defaulting to 'LOGGING_ONLY_PHASE_1' to prevent accidental promotion before cluster C pipeline lands.
Escalation router refuses to skip tiers (assertion test for every (from, to) pair).

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: MtOutcomeRecorder + EscalationRouter + DistillationCandidate (Phase-1 LOGGING_ONLY status) + FR-EVT-MT-015 emission + HardGate decision_request mailbox posting BEFORE HardGated state commit. TDD-red proof shows real test-first discipline. Executor fail-closed when HardGate chosen but no mailbox_thread_id. 11/11 Postgres-gated tests green. EscalationTier monotonic refusal to skip enforced. Distillation status column defaults to LOGGING_ONLY_PHASE_1 preventing accidental Phase-2 promotion (red_team #2 satisfied).
